title: potentilla nivea f. alpina
intro: Potentilla nivea f. alpina, also known as Alpine Cinquefoil, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, Alpine Cinquefoil has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Alpine Cinquefoil can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
